name: backtools-ext

scripts.check: node --check src/runtime/backToolsController.js && node --check src/runtime/backToolsRuntimeAdapter.js && node --check src/runtime/runtimeSnapshot.js && node --check src/runtime/reloadAndCapture.js && node --check src/ui/export/view.js && node --check src/ui/export/storage.js && node --check src/export/captureZipWriter.js && node --check src/export/manifestBuilder.js && node --check src/export/reportBuilder.js && node --check src/export/zipWriterAdapter.js && node --check devtools.js && node --check panel.js

description: Chrome DevTools extension for bounded code-rich export captures.
